в””в”Ђв”Ђ .github/workflows/
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ ci.yml
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pr-agent-context-refresh.yml
    в”њв”Ђв”Ђ pre-commit-ci-autofix-trigger.yml
    в””в”Ђв”Ђ weekly-repo-review.yml

## Critical Files

- CLI entrypoint: `src/splendor/cli.py`
- CLI command implementations: `src/splendor/commands/`
- Layout and filesystem contract: `src/splendor/layout.py`
- Config loading and defaults: `src/splendor/config.py`
- Source registration and manifest writes: `src/splendor/state/source_registry.py`
- Source resolution and validation: `src/splendor/state/source_resolver.py`
- Queue/run state helpers: `src/splendor/state/runtime.py`
- Shared workspace path validation: `src/splendor/state/paths.py`

## Schemas

- Source manifest schema: `src/splendor/schemas/source.py`
- Pointer artifact schema: `src/splendor/schemas/source_pointer.py`
- Queue/run schemas: `src/splendor/schemas/runtime.py`
- Planning object schemas: `src/splendor/schemas/planning.py`
- Wiki frontmatter schema: `src/splendor/schemas/wiki.py`
- Shared type aliases: `src/splendor/schemas/types.py`

## Internal APIs

- `register_source()` / materialization helpers: `src/splendor/state/source_registry.py`
- `resolve_source_content()`: `src/splendor/state/source_resolver.py`
- `initialize_workspace()`: `src/splendor/commands/init.py`
- `add_source()`: `src/splendor/commands/add_source.py`
- `ingest_source()`: `src/splendor/commands/ingest.py`
- `materialize_source()`: `src/splendor/commands/materialize_source.py`
- `run_health()`: `src/splendor/commands/health.py`

## Configuration and Automation

- Packaging and tool config: `pyproject.toml`
- Repo root instructions: `AGENTS.md`
- Dynamic agent state: `.agent-plan.md`
- CI and automation docs: `docs/ci_and_repo_automation.md`
- Workflow files: `.github/workflows/`

## Product and Planning Docs

- Product contract: `docs/splendor_product_spec.md`
- Delivery roadmap: `docs/splendor_mvp_to_v1_roadmap.md`
- Source-resolution implementation sequence: `docs/source_resolution_refactor_plan.md`
- Schema summary: `docs/schema_contracts.md`
